initcondition.formula: "Type of Transaction" IN ("[0] Supported Record Types1")
"Type of Transaction" IN ("[0] Supported Record Types1")
isEmpty("Linked Transaction") = 'F' AND ( "Type of Transaction" IN ("[0] Supported Record Types1") AND isEmpty("Date") = 'F' )

sendemailaction.body:
Your request to void transaction {custrecord1430} has been approved by {custrecord1434}. The void buttonwill now appear on the transaction.

Use the following link for quick access:

{custrecord1436}
sendemailaction.subject: [Approved] Transaction Void Request

sendemailaction.body:
Your request to void transaction {custrecord1430} has been rejected by {custrecord1434} with the following reason: {custrecord1433}

If you feel this is in error please talk to the approver and submit your request again.

For reference, the transaction is {custrecord1436}
sendemailaction.subject: [Rejected] Transaction Void Request

setfieldvalueaction.valueformula: CASE WHEN {custworkflow41}=1 THEN {custrecord_linked_approval_matrix.custrecord_nscs_approver1} WHEN {custworkflow41}=2 THEN {custrecord_linked_approval_matrix.custrecord_nscs_approver2} ELSE 'ERROR' END
